title: Podman machine init overwrites FCOS image when using a URL to any image
body:
### Issue Description

When creating a new Podman machine on macOS (Monterey 12.6.3) using an explicit FCOS image URL the image is downloaded but then is overwritten when decompressed. This occurs on both AMD64 and ARM64. This results in a decompressed machine disk image that still has the `.xz` extension which is inaccurate and not acceptable.

This behavior does *not* happen when one of the image streams is specified regardless of whether on the CLI or in the container orchestration engine configuration file: `stable`, `testing`, `next`. 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

#### Use Case 1: FCOS Image Specified on CLI
1. `podman machine init --image-path https://builds.coreos.fedoraproject.org/prod/streams/stable/builds/37.20230122.3.0/aarch64/fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz`
```
Downloading VM image: fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz: done  
Extracting compressed file
Image resized.
Machine init complete
To start your machine run:

	podman machine start
```
2. `find ~/.local/share/containers -type f`
```
find ~/.local/share/containers -type f                                                                                                                                                             
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_ovmf_vars.fd
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz
```

#### Use Case 2: FCOS Image Specified in Container Orchestration Configuration File
1. In **~/.config/containers/containers.conf**:
```
[machine]
image = "https://builds.coreos.fedoraproject.org/prod/streams/stable/builds/37.20230122.3.0/aarch64/fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz"
```
2. `podman machine init`
```
Downloading VM image: fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz: done  
Extracting compressed file
Image resized.
Machine init complete
To start your machine run:

	podman machine start
```
4. `find ~/.local/share/containers -type f`
```
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_ovmf_vars.fd
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz
```


### Describe the results you received

FCOS image is overwritten during machine creation / initialization. This is regardless of the FCOS image version. This also occurs if the image was pulled manually from the image URL outside of Podman.

### Describe the results you expected

The FCOS image downloaded from the specific URL not to be overwritten on the local disk and the there should be a separate backing disk image ending in `.qcow2`.

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

When using an FOCS image stream name.

#### Use Case 1: FCOS Image Specified on CLI
1. `podman machine init --image-path stable`
```
Downloading VM image: fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz: done  
Extracting compressed file
Image resized.
Machine init complete
To start your machine run:

	podman machine start
```
2. `find ~/.local/share/containers -type f`
```
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/cache/fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_ovmf_vars.fd
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2
```

#### Use Case 2: FCOS Image Specified in Container Orchestration Configuration File
1. In **~/.config/containers/containers.conf**:
```
[machine]
image = "stable"
```
2. `podman machine init`
```
Downloading VM image: fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz: done  
Extracting compressed file
Image resized.
Machine init complete
To start your machine run:

	podman machine start
```
3. `find ~/.local/share/containers -type f`
```
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/cache/fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2.xz
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_ovmf_vars.fd
/Users/me/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_fedora-coreos-37.20230122.3.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@baude Did you ever look into this? I see you assigned it to yourself.
